'''Grk'kkrs'ar''' was the name of a mythic [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] who, according to Sand People legend, never showed fear, even when facing a [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragon]].<ref name="SWG" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref>  travelers on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] were terrorized by a group that called themselves the [[Clan of Grk'kkrs'ar]]. However, it was speculated that this clan was not made up of the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] planet's fierce natives, but was instead made up of local criminals.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Grk'kkrs'ar is mentioned in the description for a mission called "The Clan of Grk'kkrs'ar", that was available to players of ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' at mission terminals on Tatooine.<ref name="SWG" />
